title: [Snyk Code] Jinja auto-escape is set to false.
description:
## Jinja auto-escape is set to false.

**Severity:** low
**Project:** `AnthusAI/Plexus`
**File:** `plexus/reports/tests/test_parameter_rendering.py`
**Location:** line 28, column 11 to line 28, column 22
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-79
### Snippet (plexus/reports/tests/test_parameter_rendering.py:26-30)
```
  26 |     """
  27 |     # Use StrictUndefined to catch missing parameters
  28 |     env = Environment(undefined=StrictUndefined)
  29 |     template = env.from_string(content)
  30 |     return template.render(**parameters)
```

**Issue Key:** 2a3fa073-00f0-418d-9d38-b3ccf424613e

### Details
Jinja auto-escape is set to false.

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.
